functionalities:
- User sees list of upcoming interviews
  ***acceptance tests***
  - Shows Deloitte Graduate Analyst (Tomorrow, 92% match), Google Product Analyst (May 20, 88% match), JPMorgan Chase (May 23, 85% match).
  - "View all applications" button is present.

- User can start and participate in a live mock interview
  ***acceptance tests***
  - Screen shows live timer (e.g. 04:32), AI interviewer chat bubbles and user response bubbles.
  - Red "End" button is available to stop the session.

- Live feedback panel shows real-time scores
  ***acceptance tests***
  - Displays scores for Communication (8.5/10), Confidence (7.8/10), Structure (8.0/10), Relevance (9.0/10), Technical Depth (7.2/10).
  - Circular progress shows questions answered (e.g. 3/8).

- AI suggestions appear during the interview
  ***acceptance tests***
  - Shows suggestions such as "Good structure in your answer", "Try to quantify your impact", "Add more about teamwork".
